launchTodos.text: Replace placeholder fonts with licensed Alphabet Soup + Futura PT, self-hosted as WOFF2 (the current Google Fonts @import loads from Google servers — a GDPR issue on its own)
Choose & integrate a cookie-consent solution (CMP vs. self-built) — required before enabling any tracking pixels
Have the legal pages reviewed & completed by legal (Impressum, Datenschutz, AGB) — Datenschutz must cover the tracking tools actually used
Wire up signup, login and contact forms to a real backend — all forms are non-functional demo mockups right now
Set up the production domain (e.g. pauland.me) with HTTPS as GitHub Pages custom domain, replacing to-tfoetsch.github.io
SEO finish: Open Graph / Twitter meta tags, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, canonical URLs
Add a custom 404 page (404.html) — GitHub Pages serves it automatically
Proofread all content: prices, phone number, address — and check the footer company name ('Paul an Me GmbH' — typo?)
Decide the final presentation settings (hero variant A/B/C, theme) here in the CMS and publish them
Cross-browser & mobile QA plus a Lighthouse pass (performance / accessibility)
Enter the real tracking IDs (GTM/GA4/Meta/LinkedIn/HubSpot) in the CMS — only after consent is live
